com.hp.workpath.api.copier

Enum CopyAttributes.NumberUpDirection

  • java.lang.Object
    • java.lang.Enum<CopyAttributes.NumberUpDirection>
      • com.hp.workpath.api.copier.CopyAttributes.NumberUpDirection
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.io.Serializable, java.lang.Comparable<CopyAttributes.NumberUpDirection>
    Enclosing class:
    CopyAttributes

    public static enum CopyAttributes.NumberUpDirection
extends java.lang.Enum<CopyAttributes.NumberUpDirection>
    Number Up Direction controls the order of images placed on a printed sheet.
    Since:
    API 3

    • Enum Constant Summary

      Enum Constants 
      Enum Constant and Description
      DEFAULT
      Use printer's settings.
      TO_BOTTOM_TO_LEFT
      From top to bottom and from right to left
      TO_BOTTOM_TO_RIGHT
      from top to bottom and from left to right
      TO_LEFT_TO_BOTTOM
      From right to left and from top to bottom
      TO_LEFT_TO_TOP
      From right to left and bottom to top
      TO_RIGHT_TO_BOTTOM
      From left to right and from top to bottom
      TO_RIGHT_TO_TOP
      From left to right and from bottom to top
      TO_TOP_TO_LEFT
      From bottom to top and from right to left
      TO_TOP_TO_RIGHT
      From bottom to top and from left to right

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Static Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      static CopyAttributes.NumberUpDirection valueOf(java.lang.String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this type with the specified name.
      static CopyAttributes.NumberUpDirection[] values()
      Returns an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared.

    • Enum Constant Detail

      • DEFAULT

        public static final CopyAttributes.NumberUpDirection DEFAULT
        Use printer's settings.
        Since:
        API 3

      • TO_BOTTOM_TO_LEFT

        public static final CopyAttributes.NumberUpDirection TO_BOTTOM_TO_LEFT
        From top to bottom and from right to left
        Since:
        API 3

      • TO_BOTTOM_TO_RIGHT

        public static final CopyAttributes.NumberUpDirection TO_BOTTOM_TO_RIGHT
        from top to bottom and from left to right
        Since:
        API 3

      • TO_LEFT_TO_BOTTOM

        public static final CopyAttributes.NumberUpDirection TO_LEFT_TO_BOTTOM
        From right to left and from top to bottom
        Since:
        API 3

      • TO_LEFT_TO_TOP

        public static final CopyAttributes.NumberUpDirection TO_LEFT_TO_TOP
        From right to left and bottom to top
        Since:
        API 3

      • TO_RIGHT_TO_BOTTOM

        public static final CopyAttributes.NumberUpDirection TO_RIGHT_TO_BOTTOM
        From left to right and from top to bottom

        API 3

        public static final CopyAttributes.NumberUpDirection TO_RIGHT_TO_TOP
        From left to right and from bottom to top
        Since:
        API 3

      • TO_TOP_TO_LEFT

        public static final CopyAttributes.NumberUpDirection TO_TOP_TO_LEFT
        From bottom to top and from right to left
        Since:
        API 3

      • TO_TOP_TO_RIGHT

        public static final CopyAttributes.NumberUpDirection TO_TOP_TO_RIGHT
        From bottom to top and from left to right
        Since:
        API 3

    • Method Detail

      • values

        public static CopyAttributes.NumberUpDirection[] values()
        Returns an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared. This method may be used to iterate over the constants as follows: 
        for (CopyAttributes.NumberUpDirection c : CopyAttributes.NumberUpDirection.values())
    System.out.println(c);
        Returns:
        an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared

      • valueOf

        public static CopyAttributes.NumberUpDirection valueOf(java.lang.String name)
        Returns the enum constant of this type with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this type. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
        Parameters:
        name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
        Returns:
        the enum constant with the specified name
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if this enum type has no constant with the specified name
        java.lang.NullPointerException - if the argument is null
